analysis.reasoning: Core message: China’s COVID-19 vaccines are advancing to Phase III, and once ready, China will make them a global public good and prioritize developing countries. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no comparison or critique of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—portrays China as providing global public goods and prioritizing developing countries, emphasizing cooperative, altruistic international behavior. CH3 (epic history): Not relevant. CH4 (appropriate political system and values, domestically): Not addressed; focus is international role. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Partially implied by vaccine development progress, but the emphasis is on sharing globally rather than domestic success or leadership; insufficient to claim this narrative. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
